title: pilosella lactucella subsp. magna
intro: Pilosella lactucella subsp. magna is a subspecies of plants in the dandelion family, known as a type of flowering plant native to certain regions of Europe and Asia. Traditionally, Pilosella lactucella subsp. magna has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. Pilosella lactucella subsp. magna can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, allowing for various applications in traditional herbal medicine.
